title: Resin Market Industry Trends and Global Forecasts 2025-2035: Expanding Use Across Various Industries, Including Aerospace, Electronics, and Medical Devices
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global resin market is projected to grow from USD 667.16 billion in 2025 to USD 1.14 trillion by 2035, with a CAGR of 5.06%. Growth is driven by advancements in resin technology and expanding applications in aerospace, electronics, and medical devices. Polyethylene currently dominates, while polyethylene terephthalate (PET) is expected to grow rapidly. Asia leads in market share, particularly China and India.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Featured among leading companies in a market projected to nearly double from $667B to $1.14T by 2035, with increasing demand for advanced resin applications.
Included in the competitive landscape of a growing resin market benefiting from technological advancements and expanding use in high-performance applications.
Listed as a key player in the resin market experiencing sustained growth driven by demand in packaging, coatings, and electronics sectors.
Featured among major resin market participants positioned to benefit from market expansion and growing applications in aerospace and electronics.
Key player in the resin market with exposure to growing segments including polyethylene and polyethylene terephthalate with strong demand projections.
Listed as a key player in the expanding resin market with strong growth projections (5.06% CAGR) across high-demand sectors including aerospace, electronics, and medical devices.

title: project44 Delivers 34% New ARR Growth Fueled by AI Agent Momentum and Intelligent TMS Expansion
author: Na
description: project44 announced Q1 FY27 results with 34% year-over-year new ARR growth and 52% growth in Shipper New ARR. The company launched an AI agent portfolio addressing key supply chain operations and deployed Autopilot, a no-code platform for managing AI-driven workflows. Customers report measurable improvements including 4% freight cost reduction, 70% reduction in manual coordination, and 75% faster sourcing cycles.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as a customer with positive feedback on project44's AI capabilities for carrier network visibility and data quality improvements, but no direct financial or operational impact disclosed.
Mentioned as a customer benefiting from project44's configurable platform for managing global carrier operations, but no direct financial or operational metrics disclosed.
Mentioned as a prospective customer planning to use project44's Movement solution for supply chain optimization, but no confirmed deployment or results disclosed.

title: Protective Films Market worth $7.62 billion by 2031, at 5.6%, says MarketsandMarkets™
author: Marketsandmarkets™
description: The global protective films market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 5.6% from 2026 to 2031, driven by rising demand across automotive, electronics, construction, and metal processing industries. Asia Pacific leads the market, with North America showing stable growth. Pressure-sensitive adhesive films and polyethylene materials dominate the market segments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Identified as a key market player in the protective films industry, which is experiencing steady growth driven by increased demand from automotive, electronics, and construction sectors.
Identified as a key player in the protective films market, which is projected to grow steadily through 2031 with increasing industrial production and infrastructure development.
Listed as a key player in the protective films market, benefiting from rising demand in the automotive and transportation sectors for surface protection solutions.
Listed as a key player in the growing protective films market, which is projected to expand at 5.6% CAGR through 2031, indicating positive growth prospects for the company.

title: Paint Protection Films Market worth $1,549.4 million by 2030, at a CAGR of 7.2%, says MarketsandMarkets™
author: Marketsandmarkets™
description: The global paint protection films market is projected to grow from USD 1,092.7 million in 2025 to USD 1,549.4 million by 2030, at a CAGR of 7.2%. Growth is driven by rising demand for premium and luxury vehicles, increasing consumer awareness about vehicle maintenance, and technological advancements in film materials including self-healing and UV protection capabilities. Asia Pacific is the fastest-growing region, while thermoplastic polyurethane (TPU) and gloss finish types dominate the market.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Listed as a key player in the growing paint protection films market, which is expanding at 7.2% CAGR with strong demand drivers from premium vehicle owners and automotive aftermarket growth.

Key market player positioned to benefit from the expanding paint protection films market driven by rising demand for vehicle protection solutions and increasing adoption in the automotive aftermarket.
Listed as a key player in the market with exposure to growing demand for advanced protective film technologies and thermoplastic polyurethane (TPU) materials.
Key player in the paint protection films market benefiting from strong growth in premium vehicle protection solutions and expanding automotive aftermarket demand.

title: Barrier Coating for Recyclable Flexible Packaging Market Trends Report 2035
author: Towards Packaging
description: The global barrier coating for recyclable flexible packaging market is projected to grow from USD 1.80 billion in 2025 to USD 6.67 billion by 2035, with a CAGR of 14.0%. Growth is driven by increasing demand for sustainable packaging, regulatory pressure to reduce plastic waste, and innovations in water-based and bio-based coatings. Asia-Pacific leads the market, while North America is the fastest-growing region.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mondi invested €16 million in barrier coating production and launched FunctionalBarrier Paper Ultimate, demonstrating strong commitment to sustainable packaging innovation and market expansion.
Listed as a Tier 1 company producing mono-material, recycle-ready films with integrated barrier technology for perishable food applications, aligning with market growth trends.
Listed as a Tier 2 company in the barrier coating market, positioned to benefit from the 14.0% CAGR growth in recyclable flexible packaging.
Included as a Tier 2 company (DuPontTeijin Films), well-positioned to capitalize on growing demand for advanced barrier coating technologies.
Listed as a Tier 2 company with potential to benefit from the expanding market for sustainable barrier coating solutions.
Featured as a Tier 1 company with blueloop™ range utilizing ultra-thin dispersion coatings for high-barrier paper solutions compatible with standard recycling.
Included as a Tier 2 company in the barrier coating market, positioned to grow with increasing demand for eco-friendly coating solutions.
